repo.name: My First F-Droid Repo Demo
repo.description: This is a repository of apps to be used with F-Droid. Applications in this repository are either official binaries built by the original application developers, or are binaries built from source by the admin of f-droid.org using the tools on https://gitlab.com/fdroid.

en-US.name: ZSticker
en-US.whatsNew:
Change endpoint to use BRIA RMBG 1.4 instead to reduce the chance to serve wrong images due to too many users.
Warning: All build having remove background function will fail. Update to this version to fix.
Remove check for network status to determine the status to remove background (no internet)
Hotfix: Add BRIA RMBG 1.4 to License
